headline: Trump's Maduro SNATCH 💥🚔 ROASTED by PALS & FOES 😤🌍
text:
UN Security Council 🤝🌐 TURNING into a ROAST SESSION 🔥🍗 over Trump's 🇺🇸🍊 BADASS RAID on Maduro's THICC ASS 🍑🔒! Foes like Russia 🐻🇷🇺 Nebenzia SLAMMING 'international banditry' 🤠💸 and 'neo-colonialism' 😈🦅, while China 🐉 Sun Lei DROPPING 'bullying acts' 💥😡 – Beijing SHOCKED AF 😱⚡ like they just got ghosted by their VPN! UN Boss Guterres 📜🙏 'deeply concerned' 😟 cuz 'law must prevail' over US muscle flex 💪🦅, no cap!

Even ALLIES simping HARD for drama 👯‍♂️: France 🥖🇫🇷 Deputy Jay Dharmadhikari SPILLING TEA ☕ 'counter to peaceful vibes ✌️ and NO FORCE 🚫💣!' – chipping away at UN foundation like termites on baguette 🥖🐛! Denmark 🇩🇰 Sandra Jensen Landi DEEP CONCERN MODE 😰 'dangerous precedent' ⚠️📜, Euro squad STIFFENING UP 😤 after initial 'hmm maybe' 🤷‍♀️. Panama 🚢 Eloy Alfaro SHAKING HEAD at Delcy Rodriguez regime continuity 😩🔄 – 'not a REAL transition bby, that's just Maduro 2.0 🕶️🍌!' Colombia 🇨🇴 Leonor Zalabata TORCHING unilateral force 🔥 'aggression VIOLATION' 🚫⚖️!

UK 🇬🇧 James Kariuki playing COOL DADDY 😎 'safe transition to legit gov plz 🙏🇻🇪' – no shade thrown at Trump Daddy 🍊👑, same with Greece 🇬🇷 Ioannis dodging the beef 🥩 like kebab master! US Ambassador Mike Waltz 🦅💼 DEFENDING THE SNATCH: 'Law enforcement OP against drug lord Maduro 🚬🕶️ turning Venezuela into Iran/Hezbollah/gang/Cuba HELLHOLE 😈🏴‍☠️! Can't let adversaries hog world's BIGGEST oil reserves ⛽🍑 under US nose 👃🤑!'

Europe in FULL DILEMMA MODE 🤯: France/Denmark/Spain 🇪🇸 Pedro Sanchez RAGING 'no illegal intervention chaos' 😡🌪️, while Keir Starmer 🇬🇧 dodging like 'US justify yo shit' 🤐⚖️. EU 🤝 'uphold law ALWAYS' but ghosting Trump's 'we RUN Venezuela now' declaration 🏃‍♂️🇺🇸💥 – Maduro's drug trafficking 'global threat' 🌍🚨 but no clapback on the takeover! Poland's Tusk 🇵🇱💪 hyping 'Europe ARM UP 🛡️ or GET WRECKED by unreliable Trump bro 🇺🇸😏 – one for all, Musketeers style ⚔️👬!'

Developing nations 😤🌍 LAUGHING 'hypocrites! Vietnam/Iraq/Venezuela = Western WMD list 📜💣' – Russia/Ukraine flip turned into Trump Venezuela ROAST 🥩🔥! Will Euros grow BALLS 🥜 and DIY security or keep simping Uncle Sam? 😩🦅 World watching this diplomatic ORGY 💦🌍 unfold BRRRRR ‼️
